description: Boolean (or tri-state) selection control built on @radix-ui/react-checkbox. The visual is a single inline SVG path filled with currentColor — the path draws both the outer square and the inner check/dash glyph at once, with the glyph rendered as a 'hole' via SVG fill-rule so the page background shows through. Two variants: box (square + glyph) and line (standalone check glyph only). Visual square is small (16/20/24px); the Root extends an invisible 8px hit-area inset compensated by negative margin so the layout footprint matches the visual size.
_classification_note: Single-file leaf control. RadixCheckbox.Root → visual <span> → inline <svg> + focus ring. No RadixCheckbox.Indicator (we render all SVG paths and toggle visibility via group-data selectors so unchecked Box variant can also draw an empty square). No external icon component dependency.

size.description: Visual size — the size of the visible square. Layout footprint matches this. @see CHECKBOX_SIZES

variant.description: Visual treatment. 'box' draws a bordered square that fills when checked. 'line' draws no box — only the check glyph appears when checked. @see CHECKBOX_VARIANTS
variant._naming_note: Figma calls this 'Style' but we use 'variant' to avoid React's reserved style prop.

checked.description: Controlled checked state. Pair with onCheckedChange. Pass 'indeterminate' for tri-state (e.g. parent of partial selection).

onCheckedChange.description: Called when toggled. Always emits boolean — Radix resolves indeterminate → false on user toggle.

disabled.description: Inactive state. Prevents interaction; hit area still exists in layout but pointer events are disabled.

name.description: Form integration — name of the hidden input.

value.description: Form integration — value submitted when checked.

required.description: Form validation — checkbox must be checked to submit.

id.description: Element id — used to associate with external <label htmlFor>.

className.description: Additional Tailwind classes merged with cn(). Applied to the Root (hit area), not the visual square.

omittedFromBase.asChild: Checkbox is a leaf control — asChild adds no value, omitted via Omit<RadixRootProps, 'asChild'>.

size._comment: Visual square dimension. Hit area = visual + 2 × inset (8px each side). Layout footprint = visual (negative margin compensation). The SVG fills the visual square at 100%.

box.unchecked: CHECKBOX_BOX_EMPTY_PATH — outer square outline, no fill inside
box.checked: CHECKBOX_BOX_CHECKED_PATH — filled square with checkmark hole (glyph appears as page background showing through)
box.indeterminate: CHECKBOX_BOX_INDETERMINATE_PATH — filled square with horizontal-dash hole

line.checked: CHECKBOX_LINE_CHECK_PATH — standalone checkmark, no surrounding box
line.indeterminate: CHECKBOX_LINE_CHECK_PATH (fallback — Figma line variant has no indeterminate; we show the check)

hitArea._comment: Critical: hit area > visual, but layout footprint = visual. Achieved with padding + matching negative margin.
hitArea.overlapPolicy: When placed adjacent to other interactive atoms, recommend gap-4 (16px) minimum to avoid hit area overlap. Showcase examples use gap-4 as the standard. JSDoc on the component documents this.

tokens._comment: All --comp-checkbox-* tokens. Sizing in :root, colors in [data-theme]. The visual is a single SVG path filled with currentColor, so a single fg color drives box outline / box fill / glyph all at once.

states._comment: Single foreground color (currentColor) drives the entire SVG. State changes recolor it; no separate overlay/border/bg layers. The Root has data-state on it (Radix), which group-data-[state=…] selectors read.

hover.implementation: fg → -hover or -checked-hover (whichever applies). No separate overlay layer.

focused.implementation: absolute span, 2px border --comp-checkbox-focus-border, opacity-0 → group-focus-visible:opacity-100. Sits at -inset-0.5 around the visual square.

implementation.pattern: cn() with simple variant branching (NOT CVA — variant axis is small enough)
structure: RadixCheckbox.Root (the hit area) — group, padding + negative margin, focus-visible target, text-color cascade
└ <span> visual square — relative wrapper sized to --comp-checkbox-visual-{size}
└ <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='currentColor'> — single source of visual
└ <path> for unchecked state (visibility toggled by group-data)
└ <span> focus ring (2px border at -inset-0.5, opacity-0 → group-focus-visible:opacity-100)
implementation.stateDriving: Radix sets data-state=checked|unchecked|indeterminate + data-disabled on Root. The Root's text-color is cascaded based on data-state + :hover + :active combinations; the SVG fills with currentColor and inherits automatically. Path visibility is driven by group-data-[state=…] selectors so each path renders only in its corresponding state.
implementation.indicatorOmission: RadixCheckbox.Indicator is intentionally NOT used. Indicator only mounts in checked|indeterminate states, but the box variant must also draw an empty square in unchecked, so we render all paths and toggle visibility via group-data-[state=…] selectors instead.
implementation.holeThroughBackground: The checked/indeterminate box paths express the inner check/dash as an SVG fill-rule hole. The page background shows through the hole. Light theme: dark fill + light page bg → light glyph appears. Dark theme: semantic tokens invert tone, so light fill + dark page bg → dark glyph appears. Auto-inverts without extra layers, provided the parent container uses --semantic-background-0.

transitions.fgColor: transition-colors duration-fast ease-enter (on Root, cascades to SVG via currentColor)

ariaSupport: Hidden form input for native form integration (Radix-managed)

labelStrategy.composition: External <label htmlFor={id}> wraps the checkbox, or future FormField wrapper
labelStrategy.rationale: Mirrors Switch — labels are layout decisions, not checkbox concerns
